title: Work featured in GMU Cyber Security Engineering story
summary: GMU's Department of Cyber Security Engineering featured the chaos-informed speech reconstruction work behind CIS-BWE in "Chaos theory finds its voice."

title: Research featured by Volgenau School of Engineering
summary: GMU's Volgenau School of Engineering featured related generative AI and signal reconstruction work in "Staying ahead of the current."

title: CIS-BWE accepted to ACL 2026
summary: CIS-BWE: Chaos-Informed Speech Bandwidth Extension was accepted to ACL 2026.

title: Expected M.S. milestone in Fall 2026
summary: Expected to receive the master's milestone in the INFT PhD program at George Mason University in Fall 2026.
